answer:
\boxed{A}

Platonic solids are regular polyhedrons with identical faces and identical vertices, and only five exist: tetrahedron (4 faces), cube (6 faces), octahedron (8 faces), dodecahedron (12 faces), and icosahedron (20 faces). A 10-sided die does not fit this definition, as no Platonic solid has 10 faces. The other options (8, 12, and 20-sided dice) correspond to valid Platonic solids.
